preflop.rationale: 72o is the worst starting hand. Fold and lose small blind. Any call/check leads to bot raising with 9-high.

fold.reason: Player folds preflop, loses small blind. Best play with 72o.

call.reason: Bot raises, player calls. Player has nothing on A-K-Q board.

check.reason: Bot raises, player calls. Player loses to bot's 9-high at showdown.

raise.reason: Bot calls with 9-high, which is unbeaten on A-K-Q board.
